header.title: General
header.subtitle: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.

deployment.heading: Deployment and auth
deployment.localTrusted: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
deployment.authenticatedPublic: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
deployment.authenticatedPrivate: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.

censor.heading: Censor username in logs
censor.description: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.

shortcuts.heading: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.

language.heading: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the PetAgent UI. The change applies immediately.

backup.heading: Backup retention
backup.description: Configure how long to keep automatic database backups at each tier. Daily backups are kept in full, then thinned to one per week and one per month. Backups are compressed with gzip.

feedback.heading: AI feedback sharing
feedback.description: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to PetAgent Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
feedback.promptHint: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
feedback.dontAllowDescription: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
feedback.footnote: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the <key/> key from the <row/> JSON row for this instance, or set it back to <prompt/>. Unset and <prompt/> both mean no default has been chosen yet.

signOut.heading: Sign out
signOut.description: Sign out of this PetAgent instance. You will be redirected to the login page.
